notes_by_gene.ADAM10: Alpha-secretase; non-amyloidogenic APP cleavage; rare AD-associated coding variants.
notes_by_gene.APP: Amyloid precursor protein; cleaved to Abeta; Mendelian autosomal-dominant early-onset AD and duplications.
notes_by_gene.PSEN1: Presenilin-1; catalytic subunit of gamma-secretase cleaving APP; most common Mendelian EOAD gene.
notes_by_gene.PSEN2: Presenilin-2; gamma-secretase subunit; rarer Mendelian autosomal-dominant EOAD.

scores._formulas: clinical_translation = 0.6*max_phase_score + 0.25*min(1, trial_count/20) + 0.15*has_results_fraction (0.0 if no mapped trials). clinical_saturation = min(1, trial_count/50). combined_support = mean over matched member genes of 0.6*genetic_support + 0.4*(functional_support or genetic_support). translation_gap = combined_support * (1 - clinical_translation) (higher = strong genetics/function but little clinical activity).
scores.crosswalk_note: pathway mechanism_group -> trial mechanism_group crosswalk: amyloid->amyloid; tau->tau; microglia_immune->inflammation_microglia; lipid_metabolism->lipid_metabolism; vascular->vascular; synaptic_neuronal->synaptic_neuroprotection; endocytosis_endosomal->none; epigenetic_transcription->none; other->other

notes_by_gene.BIN1: Bridging integrator 1; clathrin-mediated endocytosis and membrane remodeling; 2nd strongest common AD locus.
notes_by_gene.CASS4: Cas scaffold protein family member 4; cytoskeletal/endocytic adaptor signaling; AD GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.CD2AP: CD2-associated protein; endocytic cytoskeletal adaptor; AD GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.EPHA1: Ephrin type-A receptor 1; receptor endocytosis and immune trafficking; AD GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.FERMT2: Kindlin-2; integrin adhesion and APP metabolism/endocytosis; AD GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.PICALM: Phosphatidylinositol-binding clathrin assembly protein; clathrin-mediated endocytosis; strong AD GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.PTK2B: Protein tyrosine kinase 2 beta (Pyk2); endocytosis/synaptic signaling; AD GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.RIN3: Ras and Rab interactor 3; early-endosome trafficking (BIN1/RAB5 pathway); AD GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.SORL1: Sortilin-related receptor; APP trafficking and retromer-mediated sorting; both Mendelian-like and common AD variants.

scores._formulas: clinical_translation = 0.6*max_phase_score + 0.25*min(1, trial_count/20) + 0.15*has_results_fraction (0.0 if no mapped trials). clinical_saturation = min(1, trial_count/50). combined_support = mean over matched member genes of 0.6*genetic_support + 0.4*(functional_support or genetic_support). translation_gap = combined_support * (1 - clinical_translation) (higher = strong genetics/function but little clinical activity).

notes_by_gene.CELF1: CUGBP Elav-like family member 1; RNA-binding post-transcriptional regulation; AD GWAS locus (11p11 SPI1 region).
notes_by_gene.KAT8: Lysine acetyltransferase 8 (MOF); histone H4K16 acetylation; chromatin regulation; AD GWAS locus (17q21).
notes_by_gene.ZCWPW1: Zinc finger CW-type PWWP domain 1; histone-mark epigenetic reader; AD GWAS locus.

scores._formulas: clinical_translation = 0.6*max_phase_score + 0.25*min(1, trial_count/20) + 0.15*has_results_fraction (0.0 if no mapped trials). clinical_saturation = min(1, trial_count/50). combined_support = mean over matched member genes of 0.6*genetic_support + 0.4*(functional_support or genetic_support). translation_gap = combined_support * (1 - clinical_translation) (higher = strong genetics/function but little clinical activity).

notes_by_gene.ABCA1: ATP-binding cassette lipid transporter; cholesterol efflux and APOE lipidation; AD risk variants.
notes_by_gene.ABCA7: ATP-binding cassette lipid transporter; strong GWAS locus; lipid homeostasis and phagocytosis.
notes_by_gene.APOE: Apolipoprotein E; e4 is the strongest common AD risk allele; lipid and cholesterol transport
notes_by_gene.CLU: Clusterin/ApoJ; lipid transport chaperone; GWAS AD risk; also linked to Abeta clearance.
notes_by_gene.WWOX: WW domain oxidoreductase; lipid/steroid metabolism and tau interaction; AD GWAS locus.

scores._formulas: clinical_translation = 0.6*max_phase_score + 0.25*min(1, trial_count/20) + 0.15*has_results_fraction (0.0 if no mapped trials). clinical_saturation = min(1, trial_count/50). combined_support = mean over matched member genes of 0.6*genetic_support + 0.4*(functional_support or genetic_support). translation_gap = combined_support * (1 - clinical_translation) (higher = strong genetics/function but little clinical activity).

notes_by_gene.ABI3: ABI family member 3; microglial actin/phagocytosis regulator; rare AD coding variant.
notes_by_gene.CD33: Siglec-3 sialic-acid receptor on microglia; modulates phagocytosis; GWAS AD risk/protective splice variant.
notes_by_gene.CR1: Complement receptor 1; complement-mediated clearance of Abeta and immune complexes; GWAS AD locus.
notes_by_gene.HLA-DRB1: MHC class II; adaptive/innate immune antigen presentation; AD GWAS locus in MHC region.
notes_by_gene.INPP5D: SHIP1 inositol phosphatase; myeloid/microglial signaling downstream of immune receptors; GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.MS4A4A: Membrane-spanning 4A cluster; regulates soluble TREM2; myeloid immune GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.MS4A6A: Membrane-spanning 4A cluster; myeloid/microglial expression; GWAS AD locus (MS4A region).
notes_by_gene.PLCG2: Phospholipase C gamma 2; TREM2-downstream microglial signaling; protective P522R variant.
notes_by_gene.SCIMP: SLP adaptor and CSK-interacting membrane protein; microglial TLR/immune signaling; AD GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.SPI1: PU.1 master myeloid transcription factor; sets microglial gene expression; AD GWAS locus.
notes_by_gene.TREM2: Triggering receptor expressed on myeloid cells 2; microglial sensing/phagocytosis; rare high-risk coding variants (R47H).
notes_by_gene.TSPOAP1: TSPO-associated protein 1; myeloid/immune associated locus near BZRAP1; AD GWAS.

notes_by_gene.ECHDC3: Enoyl-CoA hydratase domain containing 3; possible fatty-acid metabolism but mechanism in AD uncertain.
notes_by_gene.IQCK: IQ motif containing K; function poorly characterized; AD GWAS locus with uncertain mechanism.
notes_by_gene.NME8: NME/NM23 family member 8 (thioredoxin domain); axonemal/ciliary role; AD GWAS locus with uncertain mechanism.

notes_by_gene.CNTNAP2: Contactin-associated protein 2; neuronal cell adhesion and synapse organization; neurodevelopmental/AD-associated.
notes_by_gene.SLC24A4: Sodium/potassium/calcium exchanger; neuronal calcium homeostasis; AD GWAS locus.

notes_by_gene.MAPT: Microtubule-associated protein tau; forms neurofibrillary tangles; Mendelian in FTD-tau; 17q21 haplotype.

notes_by_gene.ADAMTS1: ADAM metallopeptidase with thrombospondin motifs 1; extracellular matrix/vascular remodeling; AD GWAS locus.
